story.text:
# 🚪 Holospaces (Hologram Technologies)
**gateway** · shared · knowledge

Upstream kindred-substrate. Bootable κ-addressed environments managed by operators (the Five Laws: content-identity · canonical forms · KappaStore · substrate ops · re-derivation verification). The Swordsman's Key boots over this substrate — the kindred-substrate UOR edge made operational. Sister to the UOR Foundation as a substrate-bearing reference.
